name: ss-no-slop
description: Remove AI slop from prose: edit drafts into sharper, more human writing while preserving the writer's voice, detect and name AI patterns in a text without rewriting it, or draft new prose with no AI tells. Catches 30+ patterns: filler phrases, binary contrasts, false agency, colon reveals, importance puffery, fake-profound kickers, robotic rhythm, and more.
